title: Document Control Manager (Rail Infrastructure)
description_raw:
Morson Talent are recruiting a Document Control Manager for a major HS2 rail infrastructure package in the West Midlands. The role is engaged inside IR35 via the client's umbrella programme.

The Document Control Manager will lead the document control function for a multi-discipline engineering contract covering track infrastructure, signalling, and M&E building services scopes.

Key responsibilities:
- Lead a team of document controllers across rail infrastructure disciplines
- Maintain the project EDMS (Asite) and manage the master document register
- Own the document transmittal process with principal contractor and Network Rail
- Coordinate document submissions and RFIs with the engineering design team
- Ensure compliance with railway industry document management standards (NR/L2/INI/003)
- Report document control KPIs to the programme manager

Profile:
- 5+ years as Document Control Manager or Lead Document Controller in rail or infrastructure
- Proficient in Asite, Aconex, or 4Projects EDMS platforms
- Familiarity with Network Rail and HS2 documentation standards
- Strong organisational skills; able to manage large drawing registers

Rate: £380–£420/day inside IR35
Duration: 12 months
Start: 1 September 2026
Location: Birmingham (hybrid — 3 days on site)
